description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image. Define two stages: test and build, and include a before_script that cd's into package_archive/hyperknowledge, runs npm install, and installs Flow type definitions for jest via ./node_modules/.bin/flow-typed install jest. In the test stage add a test job that caches package_archive/hyperknowledge/node_modules/ with a key of $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME, then runs ./node_modules/.bin/flow check followed by ./node_modules/.bin/jest. In the build stage add a build job that runs NODE_ENV=production ./node_modules/.bin/webpack -p and publishes the package_archive/hyperknowledge/dist directory as an artifact that expires after one day.
